description_long: This object is a rectangular medicine box labeled 'Macro.scopia 600 mg', primarily white with green and orange text. The front face displays the product name, dosage, and additional information in Spanish, including 'Mixtura de RSS' and 'Powered by Scopia'. The left side lists the composition per dose, while the right side features a barcode and repeats the product name. The top of the box is mostly blank except for some faint text, and the back is not visible. The box appears to be made of lightweight cardboard, typical for pharmaceutical packaging, and is designed to contain medicine, likely in blister packs or sachets. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and suitable for display in pharmacies or healthcare settings.
description: A white rectangular medicine box labeled 'Macro.scopia 600 mg' with green and orange text, featuring dosage and composition details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with product name, dosage, and branding details.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the composition per dose and part of the main label.
description_view_2: Top view showing a mostly blank surface with faint text.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring a barcode and partial product name.
